name: threshtime
description: A page to convert between real life time and Threshold in-game time.

scripts.icons: magick -background none -density 1200 src/img/hourglass.svg -resize 192x192 src/img/icon-192.png && magick -background none -density 1200 src/img/hourglass.svg -resize 512x512 src/img/icon-512.png
